name: Actic Group AB (publ)
summary: Actic Group AB (publ) operates health and fitness clubs in Sweden, Norway, Germany, and Austria. It offers gym and swim facilities, as well as access to fitness clubs, PTs, and group training. The company also provides energy bars and drinks, training clothes, and other miscellaneous training products through online web shop; and training packages for corporate customers' employees, as well as arranges education program for instructors. It operates 181 clubs; and serves 222,000 members. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Solna, Sweden.
